app.title: YDB Installer
auth.signInHint: The login credentials should have been provided by the Administrator who configured this installer session.
home.heading: Login to the YDB Installer
home.description: Choose the Operator or Observer access, and enter the appropriate password.
home.useHeaderNav: Use the header to open Configuration, Monitoring, Logs, and Results.
wizard.title: Installation settings
wizard.targets.help: Define SSH targets (hostname or IP). Passwords and keys are handled as secrets and are not shown in logs (§6.6.1).
wizard.targets.defaultSshHint: Defaults apply to new target rows; per-host overrides are available in the editor.
wizard.targets.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep using keys or agent
wizard.targets.keyUploadHint: Private key upload: prototype placeholder — wire to secure storage in production.
wizard.targets.inlineOrEdit: Edit opens bastion and optional fields; inline fields cover the primary connection.
wizard.discovery.hint: Connects over SSH and collects inventory before cluster design.
wizard.results.empty: No snapshot yet. Run discovery on the previous step.
wizard.results.acknowledge: I have reviewed the discovery results and understand any per-host errors.
wizard.results.failedWarning: Some hosts reported discovery errors. You may continue if remaining hosts are sufficient for your topology.
wizard.nav.blocked: That step is not available until earlier requirements are satisfied (§6.5).
wizard.nav.completeOrInvalid: Complete required fields on this step or previous steps before continuing.
wizard.placeholder: Later steps will be added here.
wizard.storage.safetyBody: Review mounted and system disks. Destructive actions require explicit confirmation later (§9).
wizard.storage.expertHint: Override bypasses the discovery pick list and shows risk warnings in production.
wizard.storage.noDisks: No disks in snapshot for this host.
wizard.security.uploadHint: Paths or uploads — values are treated as secrets in production.
wizard.database.name: Database name
wizard.review.validationPending: Run preflight to populate validation status.
wizard.review.blockingBody: Resolve blocking findings before starting installation.
wizard.review.approveDestructive: I approve destructive actions on the listed hosts and disks.
wizard.runState.summaryBody: Phase, elapsed time, and high-level status will appear here during execution (§6.6.11).
wizard.runState.none: No pending confirmations in this prototype.
monitor.title: Installation progress
logs.title: Installation logs
logs.description: Filter and browse session logs; auto-follow during active runs (§6.9).
logs.placeholder: Log stream will connect to the session log API when available.
results.title: Installation results
results.description: Outcome summary for the current session (completed, failed, or cancelled).
batch.title: Batch installation
